search_queries: IRS applicable federal rates January 2026 revenue ruling
AFR rates January 2026 short term mid term long term
contract_notes: Report IRS Applicable Federal Rates for January 2026 only.
There are 3 term categories (short_term, mid_term, long_term) and 4 compounding periods (annual, semiannual, quarterly, monthly) = 12 values total.
All values are percentages as published by the IRS (e.g. 4.03 means 4.03%, not 0.0403).
Source is the monthly Revenue Ruling published in the Internal Revenue Bulletin.
The IRS AFR page at https://www.irs.gov/applicable-federal-rates links to the monthly revenue rulings.
